rationale: Crash when bson has no data; internal C implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
API type change to size_t; internal refactor with no contradicted spec rule.
Auto-generated index name doesn't follow spec convention FIELD_DIR_...; driver violates required naming rule.
Socket read errors not checked; internal error-handling bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Memory scribble from hard-coded stack overflow in bson nesting; internal implementation bug.
bson_oid_generated_time returns garbage on 64-bit time_t; BSON spec defines OID timestamp as 4-byte big-endian int.
Uninitialized variable in mongo_read_response; internal C memory safety bug, no spec rule.
Invalid free of cursor->reply in mongo_cursor_get_more; internal memory management bug.
Incorrect mongo_cursor_destroy call in get_more error path; internal API lifecycle bug.
GridFS API ergonomics improvement (return final bson optionally); not a spec nonconformance.
Memory leak in mongo_replica_set_client; internal resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
Feature request to reopen a finished bson; API ergonomics improvement, no spec violation.
Crash from bson_destroy on uninitialized bson in replica set check seed; internal C bug.
Assertion error with concurrent clients; internal concurrency/message-ID bug, no specific spec rule.
Improvement to add error checking to GridFS reads/writes; not a spec nonconformance.
Documentation typo in BSON example code; no driver behavior involved.
Release tracking ticket; no spec or driver behavior content.
Empty description; insufficient detail to determine if a spec rule was violated.
bson_oid_gen thread safety bug with static incr; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule.
Adding a thread-safety test; test improvement, not a spec test infrastructure ticket.
C driver doesn't support read preference modes; doc says drivers must support five modes, driver violated requirement.
Non-blocking connect timeout improvement; performance/architecture change, no spec rule.
Adding tag sets to read preferences; server selection spec requires tag set support, driver was missing it.
pkg-config support request; build/packaging, no spec involvement.
C driver missing MongoDB Connection URI support; connection string spec requires URI parsing.
Performance optimization using vectored network send; no spec behavior change.
Adding read preference for replica set connections; server selection spec requires read preference support.
Driver errors on direct slave connection regardless of intent; read preference spec allows reads from secondaries.
Null pointer segfault in bson_append_string; implementation safety bug, no spec rule violated.
mongo_client API doesn't support multiple hosts; connection URI spec requires multi-host support; mentions other drivers.
FreeBSD hostname resolution bug in replica set client; platform-specific DNS issue, no spec rule.
Missing soname version on shared library; build/packaging/ABI issue, no spec involvement.
write_concern majority mode nullified by logic checking w<1; driver violates write concern spec's majority mode.
Infrastructure improvement to cache wire version from isMaster; proactive feature, no existing spec rule violated.
Empty description; insufficient detail to classify as spec nonconformance vs. feature addition.
Internal cursor flag semantics/API design issue; no spec rule violated.
Internal macro refactor to avoid linking against printf; build/internal change.
GridFS test file write broken on Windows; platform-specific test bug, not spec behavior.
bson_append_regex fails to correctly handle forward slashes; BSON spec defines regex encoding, driver violates it.
Adding GridFS to new C driver rewrite; new feature implementation, not a spec violation.
SSL/TLS support addition to new C driver; new feature, no existing spec violation.
GridFS API convenience improvement for passing user metadata; ergonomics, no spec violation.
Bulk insert support added to new driver; feature addition for new command-based insert, not a nonconformance.
Commands to mongos break when sending $readPreference; server selection spec defines how read preference is sent to mongos.
Connection warm-up to learn peer wire version before RPC; proactive infrastructure improvement, no spec rule violated.
Adding sharded cluster support to new C driver; new feature/infrastructure, no existing spec violation.
Driver doesn't add _id to insert documents; CRUD spec requires drivers to generate and prepend _id if absent.
Rename private symbols with _ prefix; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Linker flag change for symbol export; build system change, no spec involvement.
Adding SSL pkg-config file; build/packaging change, no spec involvement.
